Reign Over Me (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,661,987Details
International Box Office $420,000
Worldwide Box Office $20,081,987
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,958,771
Total $16,958,771
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,460,690 (37.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,671 opening theaters/1,747 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,179,850

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: October 9th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language and some sexual references
Running Time: 124 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Depression, Mental Illness, Terrorism
Subgenre: Life Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
